rag_rules: Fix AGREE type errors by resolving root causes of '<error>' types in binary expressions, ensuring all identifiers are valid and visible in the current scope.
When AGREE diagnostics reference implementation-level elements in component type annexes, move valid implementation bindings to the implementation annex or remove invalid guarantees.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all expressions on both sides of '=>' have matching boolean types.
Only reference visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes to avoid '<error>' type issues.
Move implementation-specific bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when necessary.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE binary expressions must have boolean types on both sides of '=>'.
Component type contracts should only reference features available at the type scope.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve root causes or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope boundaries for assumptions and guarantees
AGREE annex placement in component types vs implementations
